name: Multi-Location EHS Chemical Storage Entry
description:
As the EHS technician for the facility, you need to add a new chemical to the annual Tier II report using EPA Tier2 Submit. The application is already open. First, import the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\green_valley_baseline.t2s. Then, navigate to the Chemicals section and add a new chemical with the following details:

- Name: Sulfuric Acid
- CAS Number: 7664-93-9
- EHS (Extremely Hazardous Substance): Yes (Checked)
- Pure Chemical: Yes
- Physical Hazards: Reactive (check this), ensure Fire and Pressure are unchecked.
- Health Hazards: Immediate (Acute) and Delayed (Chronic) (check both).
- Quantities: Max Daily Amount: 75,000 lbs; Average Daily Amount: 50,000 lbs; Days On-Site: 365.

Add THREE separate storage locations for this chemical:
1. Location: 'Bulk Tank Farm - North Yard', Type: Above ground tank, Pressure: Ambient, Temp: Ambient.
2. Location: 'Production Floor Staging Area - Building 3', Type: Steel drum, Pressure: Ambient, Temp: Greater than ambient temperature.
3. Location: 'Maintenance Shop - Building 7', Type: Plastic or non-metallic drum, Pressure: Ambient, Temp: Ambient.

Save the chemical record, and then Export the submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\multi_location_storage.t2s.
